user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set the day from which an employee timesheet should be visible and the number of previous weekends shown by default, so that timesheets display the correct week period
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Timesheet settings screen; When I select the start day and number of previous weekends; Then timesheets are rendered using those period settings

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to require timesheet approval and set the number of days allowed for submission after the week period, so that submissions follow policy
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Timesheet settings screen; When I enable Timesheet Approval is required and set the allowed submission days; Then submissions and approvals are enforced accordingly

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to define the minimum number of timesheet hours per day, so that employees log sufficient time
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Timesheet settings screen; When I enter a minimum hours-per-day value; Then timesheet entries are validated against that minimum

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure submission reminders including days before week end and CC to the reporting manager, so that employees are prompted to submit on time
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Timesheet settings screen; When I enable reminders for timesheet submission and set the reminder days and CC option; Then reminder emails are scheduled as configured

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure approval reminders and escalation emails to the coordinator, so that pending approvals are followed up
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Timesheet settings screen; When I enable reminders for timesheet approval and set reminder and escalation days; Then approval reminder and escalation emails are triggered accordingly

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable leave penalty rules with pending hours and penalty hours for approving managers, so that non-compliance is penalized
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Timesheet settings screen; When I enable Organization support leave penalty and set pending and penalty hours; Then penalties are applied based on those thresholds

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to select the utilization type, so that timesheet reporting uses the correct utilization basis
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Timesheet settings screen; When I select a utilization type; Then utilization is calculated using that setting

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save my timesheet settings and navigate to related Setup and Timesheet Approvers tabs, so that all timesheet configuration is applied
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured timesheet settings; When I click Save or open the Setup or Timesheet Approvers tab; Then my settings are persisted and the related screens are accessible
